description: Legal document in Arabic script. Dated: 20 Shawwāl 864 AH, which is 1460 CE. Involves Yūsuf [...] and Samawʾal b. Yaʿqūb b. Mūsā (=Shemuel b. Yaʿaqov b. Moshe) the druggist, the Rabbanite Jew. A sum (perhaps a debt or loan) of 5 dinars is mentioned. A new section begins around line 7 or 8, which involves Nūr al-Dīn b. Shihāb al-Dīn Aḥmad b. Ismāʿīl known as Ibn al-[...] and someone titled Sirāj al-Dīn Sharaf al-ʿUlamāʾ Muslim Abū Jaʿfar [...]. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בNLI.
